title: zinnia elegans var. coccinea
intro: Zinnia elegans var. coccinea, commonly known as the Scarlet Zinnia or Mexican Zinnia, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zinnia elegans var. coccinea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
